docs: SAP v2 — Onchain agent identity, reputation, and discovery protocol.

instructions.name: add_to_capability_index
docs: Add the caller's agent to an existing capability index.

instructions.name: add_to_index_page
docs: Add agent to overflow page.

instructions.name: add_to_protocol_index
docs: Add the caller's agent to an existing protocol index.

instructions.name: add_to_tool_category
docs: Add tool to category index. Verifies tool.category match.

instructions.name: add_vault_delegate
docs: Add delegate (hot wallet). Bitmask: 1=inscribe, 2=close, 4=open. expires_at: 0=never.

instructions.name: auto_resolve_dispute
docs: Permissionless auto-resolution after proof deadline.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Anyone can crank

instructions.name: cancel_subscription
docs: Depositor cancels subscription. Remaining balance refunded.

instructions.name: claim_interval
docs: Permissionless crank: claim completed billing intervals.

instructions.name: close_agent
docs: Close agent PDA. Rent → wallet. Remove from indexes first.

instructions.name: close_attestation
docs: Close revoked attestation PDA. Must revoke first.

instructions.name: close_capability_index
docs: Close empty capability index PDA. Remove all agents first.

instructions.name: close_checkpoint
docs: Close a checkpoint PDA (rent returned to wallet).

instructions.name: close_dispute
docs: Close finalized dispute PDA. Depositor reclaims rent.

instructions.name: close_epoch_page
docs: Close an EpochPage PDA and reclaim rent.

instructions.name: close_escrow
docs: Close empty escrow PDA. Withdraw first.

instructions.name: close_escrow_v2
docs: Close empty V2 escrow. No pending settlements allowed.

instructions.name: close_feedback
docs: Close revoked feedback PDA. Rent → reviewer.

instructions.name: close_index_page
docs: Close empty overflow page. Reclaim rent.

instructions.name: close_ledger
docs: Close ledger PDA. Sealed pages remain permanent.

instructions.name: close_pending_settlement
docs: Close finalized pending settlement PDA. Reclaim rent.

instructions.name: close_protocol_index
docs: Close empty protocol index PDA. Remove all agents first.

instructions.name: close_session
docs: Close a session — no more inscriptions allowed after this.

instructions.name: close_session_pda
docs: Close session PDA. Must be closed (via close_session) first.

instructions.name: close_subscription
docs: Close cancelled subscription PDA. Reclaim rent.

instructions.name: close_tool
docs: Close a tool PDA (rent returned to wallet).

instructions.name: close_tool_category_index
docs: Close empty tool category index. Remove all tools first.

instructions.name: close_vault
docs: Close the MemoryVault PDA and reclaim rent.

instructions.name: compact_inscribe
docs: DX-first inscription (4 args vs 8). Single fragment, no compression/epochs.

instructions.name: complete_unstake
docs: Complete unstake after cooldown period.

instructions.name: create_attestation
docs: Create attestation. attestation_type: max 32 chars. expires_at: 0=never.

accounts.name: agent
docs: Agent being attested — attester must NOT be owner

instructions.name: create_escrow
docs: Create escrow. Locks price_per_call + optional max_calls. token_mint: None=SOL.

accounts.name: agent
docs: Agent to prepay for — anyone can create escrow

instructions.name: create_escrow_v2
docs: Create V2 escrow with settlement security mode.

instructions.name: create_pending_settlement
docs: Create PendingSettlement PDA (DisputeWindow mode).

instructions.name: create_session_checkpoint
docs: Checkpoint: snapshot merkle_root + counters for fast sync.

instructions.name: create_subscription
docs: Create subscription to agent.

instructions.name: deactivate_agent
docs: Set is_active=false. Index entries filtered on read.

instructions.name: deactivate_tool
docs: Deactivate a tool (still discoverable but marked unavailable).

instructions.name: deposit_escrow
docs: Deposit additional SOL into an existing escrow.

instructions.name: deposit_escrow_v2
docs: Deposit into V2 escrow.

instructions.name: deposit_stake
docs: Deposit more SOL into agent stake.

instructions.name: file_dispute
docs: Depositor files dispute on a pending settlement.

instructions.name: finalize_settlement
docs: Finalize settlement after dispute window. Permissionless crank.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Anyone can crank

instructions.name: fund_subscription
docs: Fund subscription with additional SOL.

instructions.name: give_feedback
docs: Leave feedback for agent. One per (agent, reviewer). Score 0-1000.

accounts.name: agent
docs: The agent being reviewed — must be active, reviewer must NOT be the agent owner

instructions.name: init_capability_index
docs: Init capability index + add caller’s agent. Client computes SHA-256(capability_id).

accounts.name: agent
docs: Proves caller owns this agent

instructions.name: init_index_page
docs: Init overflow index page.

accounts.name: parent_index
docs: The parent index account (CategoryIndex or CapabilityIndex PDA)

instructions.name: init_ledger
docs: Init MemoryLedger with 4KB ring. Fixed ~0.032 SOL.

instructions.name: init_protocol_index
docs: Create a new protocol index and add the caller's agent.

instructions.name: init_shard
docs: Init counter shard for a parent account.

instructions.name: init_stake
docs: Init agent stake PDA with initial deposit.

instructions.name: init_tool_category_index
docs: Init tool category index. category: 0=Swap..9=Custom.

instructions.name: init_vault
docs: Init vault. vault_nonce = PBKDF2 salt. Key derived client-side, never onchain.

instructions.name: initialize_global
docs: Init global registry singleton. Must be called first.

instructions.name: inscribe_memory
docs: Inscribe AES-256-GCM ciphertext to TX log. Zero rent. Fragment if >750B.

accounts.name: epoch_page
docs: EpochPage PDA — auto-created per epoch.

instructions.name: inscribe_memory_delegated
docs: Inscribe via authorized delegate. Same as inscribe_memory, delegate signs.

accounts.name: agent
docs: Agent account — NOT derived from delegate signer.

accounts.name: vault_delegate
docs: Delegate authorization check

instructions.name: inscribe_receipt_batch
docs: Agent commits a batch of receipt merkle roots.

instructions.name: inscribe_tool_schema
docs: Inscribe JSON schema to TX log. schema_type: 0=input, 1=output, 2=desc.

instructions.name: open_session
docs: Open session. session_hash = SHA-256 of deterministic ID.

instructions.name: publish_tool
docs: Publish tool PDA. tool_name_hash = sha256(tool_name).

instructions.name: reactivate_agent
docs: Reactivate a previously deactivated agent.

instructions.name: reactivate_tool
docs: Reactivate a previously deactivated tool.

instructions.name: register_agent
docs: Register a new agent PDA with metadata.

instructions.name: remove_from_capability_index
docs: Remove the caller's agent from a capability index.

instructions.name: remove_from_index_page
docs: Remove agent from overflow page.

instructions.name: remove_from_protocol_index
docs: Remove the caller's agent from a protocol index.

instructions.name: remove_from_tool_category
docs: Remove a tool from a category index.

instructions.name: request_unstake
docs: Request unstake — starts 7-day cooldown. Supports partial unstake.

instructions.name: revoke_attestation
docs: Revoke attestation. Original attester only.

instructions.name: revoke_feedback
docs: Mark feedback as revoked. Excluded from reputation.

instructions.name: revoke_vault_delegate
docs: Revoke a delegate's authorization (closes PDA, returns rent).

instructions.name: rotate_vault_nonce
docs: Rotate vault PBKDF2 nonce. Old nonce emitted for historical decryption.

instructions.name: seal_ledger
docs: Seal ring into permanent LedgerPage. Write-once, no close exists.

instructions.name: settle_batch
docs: Batch settle up to 10 settlements in one TX. Volume curve spans batch.

instructions.name: settle_calls
docs: Agent settles calls — claims funds from escrow. service_hash = proof of work.

accounts.name: wallet
docs: Agent owner — signs settlement + receives payment

accounts.name: agent
docs: PDA derivation for escrow + stats.

instructions.name: settle_calls_v2
docs: Agent settles calls via V2 escrow. Mode-dispatched.

accounts.name: wallet
docs: Agent owner signs

instructions.name: submit_agent_evidence
docs: Agent submits counter-evidence for a dispute.

instructions.name: submit_receipt_proof
docs: Agent submits receipt proofs during dispute resolution.

instructions.name: update_agent
docs: Partial agent metadata update. None = unchanged.

instructions.name: update_feedback
docs: Update feedback. Original reviewer only.

instructions.name: update_tool
docs: Update tool schema hashes + bump version. None = unchanged.

instructions.name: withdraw_escrow
docs: Client withdraws from escrow. Withdraws min(amount, balance).

instructions.name: withdraw_escrow_v2
docs: Withdraw from V2 escrow (available balance only).

instructions.name: write_ledger
docs: Write to TX log (permanent) + ring buffer (instant read). Cost = TX fee.

types.name: AccountMigratedEvent
docs: Account migrated to v2 layout.

fields.name: total_calls_served
docs: DEPRECATED: use AgentStats.total_calls_served (hot-path PDA)

types.name: AttestationCreatedEvent
docs: Attestation created.

types.name: AttestationRevokedEvent
docs: Attestation revoked.

types.name: BatchSettledEvent
docs: Batch settlement. service_hashes preserved for dispute resolution.

types.name: BillingInterval
docs: Subscription billing interval.

types.name: Capability
docs: Agent capability descriptor.

fields.name: id
docs: Capability ID, e.g. "jupiter:swap"

fields.name: description
docs: Description

fields.name: protocol_id
docs: Protocol group, e.g. "jupiter"

fields.name: version
docs: Semver, e.g. "1.0.0"

types.name: CheckpointCreatedEvent
docs: Session checkpoint created.

types.name: CoSignedSettlementEvent
docs: Co-signed settlement executed immediately (CoSigned mode).

types.name: DisputeAutoResolvedEvent
docs: Dispute auto-resolved via receipt proofs (no arbiter).

types.name: DisputeFiledEvent
docs: Dispute filed by depositor.

types.name: DisputeOutcome
docs: Dispute resolution outcome.

types.name: DisputeResolvedEvent
docs: Dispute resolved by arbiter.

types.name: DisputeType
docs: Dispute type — determines resolution path.

fields.name: volume_curve
docs: Tiered pricing curve (max 5 breakpoints). Spans tier boundaries.

fields.name: token_mint
docs: None = SOL, Some = SPL token.

fields.name: token_decimals
docs: Token decimals (9=SOL, 6=USDC). Informational.

fields.name: arbiter
docs: DEPRECATED in v0.7 — arbiter removed, disputes auto-resolved via receipts

types.name: EscrowClosedEvent
docs: Escrow closed. Rent returned to depositor. Balance was already 0.

types.name: EscrowCreatedEvent
docs: Escrow created for micropayments.

types.name: EscrowDepositedEvent
docs: Additional escrow deposit.

types.name: EscrowV2CreatedEvent
docs: EscrowV2 created with settlement security mode.

types.name: EscrowWithdrawnEvent
docs: Escrow withdrawal.

fields.name: total_escrows
docs: DEPRECATED: escrow no longer updates GlobalRegistry

types.name: IndexPageCreatedEvent
docs: Overflow index page created.

types.name: LedgerEntryEvent
docs: Ledger write. Carries data in TX log — permanent, immutable.

types.name: LedgerSealedEvent
docs: Ring sealed into permanent page. Write-once, no close exists.

types.name: MemoryInscribedEvent
docs: AES-256-GCM ciphertext inscription. Permanent TX log, zero rent.
compression: 0=none, 1=deflate, 2=gzip, 3=brotli.

types.name: PaymentSettledEvent
docs: Payment receipt. service_hash = sha256 proof of service.

types.name: PluginRef
docs: Reference to an active plugin PDA

types.name: PricingTier
docs: Pricing tier for agent services.

fields.name: tier_id
docs: Tier ID, e.g. "standard"

fields.name: price_per_call
docs: Base price per call (smallest unit)

fields.name: min_price_per_call
docs: Price floor (optional)

fields.name: max_price_per_call
docs: Price ceiling (optional)

fields.name: rate_limit
docs: Max calls/sec

fields.name: max_calls_per_session
docs: Max calls/session (0=unlimited)

fields.name: burst_limit
docs: Max burst/sec (optional)

fields.name: token_type
docs: Token type

fields.name: token_mint
docs: SPL mint (required if Spl)

fields.name: token_decimals
docs: Token decimals (9=SOL, 6=USDC)

fields.name: settlement_mode
docs: Settlement mode

fields.name: min_escrow_deposit
docs: Min escrow deposit (Escrow mode)

fields.name: batch_interval_sec
docs: Batch interval sec (Batched mode)

fields.name: volume_curve
docs: Volume discount curve (max 5)

types.name: ReceiptBatchInscribedEvent
docs: Receipt batch committed on-chain.

types.name: ReceiptProofSubmittedEvent
docs: Receipt proof submitted during dispute.

types.name: ResolutionLayer
docs: Resolution layer — how the dispute was resolved.

fields.name: merkle_root
docs: Rolling merkle: sha256(prev_root || content_hash). Tamper-proof chain.

fields.name: total_checkpoints
docs: Checkpoints created for this session.

fields.name: tip_hash
docs: Last content_hash. O(1) change detection. [0;32] = none.

types.name: Settlement
docs: Individual settlement entry for batch.

fields.name: calls_to_settle
docs: Calls to bill

fields.name: service_hash
docs: sha256 proof of service

types.name: SettlementFinalizedEvent
docs: Pending settlement finalized (auto-released after dispute window).

types.name: SettlementPendingEvent
docs: Settlement entered pending state (DisputeWindow mode).

types.name: SettlementSecurity
docs: Settlement security level — determines how settle_calls is authorized.

types.name: ShardInitializedEvent
docs: Counter shard initialized.

types.name: StakeDepositedEvent
docs: Agent staked collateral.

types.name: StakeSlashedEvent
docs: Stake slashed due to lost dispute.

types.name: SubscriptionCancelledEvent
docs: Subscription cancelled (pro-rata refund available).

types.name: SubscriptionClaimedEvent
docs: Subscription interval claimed by agent.

types.name: SubscriptionCreatedEvent
docs: New subscription created and funded.

types.name: ToolCategory
docs: Tool category for discovery filtering.

types.name: ToolClosedEvent
docs: Tool PDA closed, rent recovered.

types.name: ToolDeactivatedEvent
docs: Tool deactivated.

types.name: ToolHttpMethod
docs: HTTP method enum for tool descriptor.

types.name: ToolInvocationReportedEvent
docs: Tool invocation counter reported.

types.name: ToolPublishedEvent
docs: Tool descriptor published. Schema JSON inscribed via ToolSchemaInscribedEvent.

types.name: ToolReactivatedEvent
docs: Tool reactivated.

types.name: ToolSchemaInscribedEvent
docs: Full JSON schema inscribed to TX log. schema_type: 0=input, 1=output, 2=desc.
Verify: sha256(schema_data) == schema_hash. compression: 0=none, 1=deflate.

types.name: ToolUpdatedEvent
docs: Tool schema updated, version bumped.

types.name: UnstakeCompletedEvent
docs: Unstake completed after cooldown.

types.name: UnstakeRequestedEvent
docs: Unstake requested (starts cooldown).

types.name: VolumeCurveBreakpoint
docs: Volume curve breakpoint for tiered billing.

fields.name: after_calls
docs: Cumulative calls threshold

fields.name: price_per_call
docs: Price per call after threshold (smallest unit)
